payload: Pick up the last task we left of and continue. Not exp_gram_schmidt_composition - make sure your experiments with mlx don't consume all resources

exp_ffn_only_vs_all_modules: PROVEN. FFN-only LoRA more orthogonal (mean |cos| 0.0605 vs 0.0711 all-modules). Attention is shared infrastructure (0.0853). 25% fewer params. Quality gap inconclusive at micro scale.

exp_ffn_only_vs_all_modules: REVISE with 5 fixes: (1) acknowledge retroactive-subset confound, (2) report median/without-outlier as co-equal, (3) downgrade Assumption 2 to approximate proxy, (4) reconcile N_max formulas, (5) change status to supported

exp_ffn_only_vs_all_modules revision complete: 5 fixes applied (retroactive-subset confound acknowledged, outlier-excluded stats co-equal, Assumption 2 downgraded to approximate proxy, N_max formulas reconciled, status changed to supported)
exp_ffn_only_vs_all_modules: adversarial review PROCEED, status supported, 2 new hypotheses spawned (exp_ffn_only_matched_rank, exp_attention_as_domain_similarity)

exp_adapter_taxonomy_wild: SUPPORTED. 15 adapter types surveyed across 5 dimensions. LoRA optimal (FIT=0.875). Three composition classes: A (additive/LoRA), B (caveats/DoRA), C (incompatible/IA3,Houlsby). Base-freedom possible via ReLoRA/LTE. No base-free composable model exists in literature. Both kill criteria survive. Unblocks exp_base_free_composition and exp_adapter_as_base.

exp_adapter_taxonomy_wild: 4 required fixes: (1) correct interference bound formula MATH.md §5.1 - derive properly or use empirical cos~0.0002, (2) note full-rank adapters Class A only for single-adapter case, (3) cite He et al 2022 + Lialin et al 2023 as prior taxonomy surveys, (4) label effective_dims_per_param as heuristic estimates. Advisory: rename supported→documented, acknowledge FIT circularity, add exp_relora_composition_test.

exp_adapter_taxonomy_wild revision complete: (1) interference bound formula corrected to r/sqrt(D), (2) full-rank Class A caveat added, (3) He et al 2022 + Lialin et al 2023 cited, (4) effective_dims_per_param labeled as heuristic. Advisory: FIT circularity acknowledged, exp_relora_composition_test added as next step. All 13 tests pass.

exp_adapter_taxonomy_wild proven. Review passed revision round (4 required fixes + 3 advisory verified). New nodes: exp_relora_composition_test (priority 2, base-freedom empirical gate), exp_compressed_expert_sweep (priority 3, storage scaling). Dependents unblocked: exp_base_free_composition, exp_adapter_as_base.

exp_relora_composition_test supported. ReLoRA base viable composition substrate: cos ratio 2.13x (kill >10x), quality 93.6% (kill <50%), base coherent. 3 seeds at micro scale (d=64, r=8, L=4, N=4 experts). First empirical evidence for base-is-just-another-adapter thesis. Unblocks exp_base_free_composition.

exp_relora_composition_test: 5 required fixes. (1) Training data asymmetry bug: conventional experts trained on val split not train split - re-run all seeds after fix. (2) Evaluation data consistency: both conditions must eval on same held-out data. (3) Report confidence intervals on cos ratio (per-seed: 1.53x, 1.71x, 3.13x). (4) Clarify MATH.md/PAPER.md that ReLoRA pretrains ALL params, not just LoRA. (5) Remove or relabel stale results.json (integration test data). Advisory: stop reporting 0.936 as 93.6% quality; consider permutation test on cosines.

exp_relora_composition_test rev2: All 5 fixes applied (data asymmetry, eval consistency, 95% CI, all-param clarification, results.json renamed). cos_ratio 2.13x->1.77x (CI [0.77,2.64], p=0.056 not significant). Loss ratio 1.052 (5.2% gap). 20/20 tests pass.

exp_relora_composition_test proven. Adversarial review PROCEED. Rev2 numbers integrated. 2 new nodes spawned: exp_relora_composition_macro (macro validation), exp_relora_merge_cycle_scaling (K scaling). Dependents unblocked: exp_base_free_composition.

exp_base_free_composition proven. Rank-16 SVD base decomposition: 1.4% expert quality loss, 1.22x cos ratio, 0.001s decomposition cost. All 3 kill criteria disproven (3 seeds). exp_adapter_as_base subsumed and also proven. 27 tests pass. Entire model now composable: skeleton + base_adapter + N domain experts.
exp_base_free_composition reviewed (PROCEED) and integrated. 2 new hypotheses spawned: exp_zero_shot_base_transfer, exp_delta_rank_scaling.

exp_zero_shot_base_transfer PROVEN. Zero-shot transfer works: rank-32 gap 0.2%, rank-16 gap 2.8%. Key finding: ZS experts amplify base error (unlike retrained which compensate). 0/48 pairs exceed 2x kill threshold across 3 seeds.
exp_zero_shot_base_transfer PROVEN. Adversarial review: PROCEED. Spawned 2 new hypotheses: exp_fewshot_adaptation_recovery (P3), exp_amplification_factor_scaling (P4).

exp_composition_naming PROVEN: Recommended name 'Orthogonal Additive Experts (OAE)'. Surveyed 13 papers, established glossary (skeleton, expert, expert library, composition, selection set). exp_inference_latency_vs_N PROVEN: Pre-merge zero overhead, dynamic latency depends on k not N, hash ring 0.5us. All 3 kill criteria pass.

exp_composition_naming (OAE) and exp_inference_latency_vs_N both PROCEED. Integrated to HYPOTHESES.yml, VISION.md, FINDINGS.md. Spawned 2 new nodes: exp_gpu_latency_validation (P4), exp_oae_vs_lora_soups (P3).

Two P2 experiments completed in parallel. (1) exp_orthogonality_by_domain_type: PROVEN — within-cluster cos 7.84x higher than cross-cluster (p<0.0001, Cohen d=2.24). Collisions are predictable by semantic similarity. Unblocks exp_collision_scaling. (2) exp_ppl_vs_task_performance: KILLED — Pearson r=0.084, PPL is misleading proxy. Reverse/sort experts get worse PPL but better accuracy. Implication: shadow scoring needs answer-conditioned PPL, not full-sequence.

Adversarial review complete. Both PROCEED. exp_orthogonality_by_domain_type: proven (7.84x ratio, review notes data-cosine baseline gap). exp_ppl_vs_task_performance: kill accepted (r=0.08, review notes N=5 underpowered but mechanistic argument sound). Added exp_answer_conditioned_scoring hypothesis (P3). Updated VISION.md shadow scoring to use answer-conditioned PPL.

exp_ffn_only_matched_rank: Infrastructure complete. Training script, analysis script, RunPod orchestrator, and 8 tests all ready. Baseline retroactive orthogonality confirmed (FFN subset mean|cos|=0.0605). Awaiting RunPod A5000 GPU to train 5 FFN-only rank-16 adapters (~75min, ~/bin/zsh.40). Kill criteria: K1 FFN-only PPL within 5% of all-modules, K2 independent orthogonality within 50% of retroactive baseline.

exp_ffn_only_matched_rank: Design review PROCEED (no results yet, infrastructure only). Recommendations: (1) uncomment --also-train-all, (2) 3 seeds, (3) ortho with/without math-medical, (4) save loss curves. Ready for GPU execution on RunPod A5000, ~$1.20 with recommendations.

exp_ffn_only_matched_rank: 4 reviewer recommendations implemented (--also-train-all enabled, 3-seed loop, ortho excl math-medical outlier, loss curves + convergence check). 8/8 tests pass. RunPod offline — experiment ready for GPU execution at ~$1.20 on A5000.

## Reason
max_runtime

## Status
Stopped at runtime limit.

## Summary

- Duration: 4h 3m 58s
- Exit code: 2
